source_of_truth: SPEC §5.5/§7.3 (2026-07-17 增补, 62-2b Phase 1); Server/Connector/Provider share this fixture verbatim
note: All series use a fixed 1h (3600s) step starting at ts=0 unless a case overrides `interval`/`primary_interval`. `value: null` in `input` marks a genuine mid-stream gap (a timestamp the fetch reports but with no value) — distinct from a timestamp simply absent before the series' first entry, which is the stream-start boundary case. `expected: null` marks a frame the primitive must report missing (never a fabricated value).

cases.name: rolling_quantile_min_periods_boundary_and_interpolation
cases.description: f=1,2 < min_periods=3 -> missing; f=3 at the stream-start boundary (window_bars=4 not yet reached) uses R-7 with n=3; f=4 once the window is full uses n=4 with a fractional interpolation.

cases.name: rolling_quantile_gap_is_never_skipped
cases.description: ts=3600's value is a genuine gap (present timestamp, null value). Every frame whose window still includes ts=3600 stays missing regardless of min_periods, until the window slides past it.

cases.name: rolling_extreme_max_and_min_no_leniency
cases.description: rolling_extreme never has min_periods leniency: f<window_bars is always missing, exactly like the frozen rolling_sum semantics.

cases.name: rolling_extreme_min_with_gap
cases.description: ts=3600 is a genuine gap; both the frame at the gap itself and the following frame whose window still includes it are missing.

cases.name: rsi_wilder_seed_at_fetch_window_start
cases.description: Seed = simple average of the first 2 deltas measured from this series' own first entry (ts=0), never any hypothetical longer history. avg_loss=0 at the seed gives RSI=100; alternating +2/-2 deltas afterward keep every recursive step an exact decimal.

cases.name: rsi_wilder_broken_chain_never_recovers
cases.description: The seed (ts=7200) only needs the first 2 deltas and is unaffected by a later gap. ts=10800's value is itself missing, which breaks the Wilder recursion irrecoverably: every later frame stays missing even though ts=14400/18000 carry valid raw values, because avg[t] is a strict function of avg[t-1].

cases.name: ohlcv_resample_4h_drops_incomplete_trailing_bucket
cases.description: 9 hourly bars: two complete UTC-aligned 4h buckets ([0,14400) and [14400,28800)) are emitted; the 9th bar alone in [28800,43200) is an incomplete bucket and must never be emitted (no partial aggregation, never fabricated).
